vibe: Luxury banking meets traditional Indian Bahi Khata. Trust, legacy, wealth, and absolute clarity.

layout_and_spacing.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 lg:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 2px). The aesthetic is sharp and paper-like, not soft SaaS.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. Use crisp 1px borders instead of heavy drop shadows to separate elements.

components_styling.sidebar: bg-[#1B2A4A] text-white. Active state: bg-[#131F37] border-l-4 border-[#C5A55A] text-[#C5A55A].
components_styling.mtd_summary_bar: bg-[#1B2A4A] text-white px-6 py-4 border-b-4 border-[#C5A55A] flex justify-between items-center text-sm. Numbers should be highlighted in gold (#C5A55A) and use a serif font.
components_styling.metric_cards: bg-white p-5 border border-[#E2E0D8] relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-between. Use a subtle 2px top border of #C5A55A for primary cards. No rounded corners.
components_styling.data_tables: border-collapse w-full. th: border-b-2 border-[#1B2A4A] text-left p-3. td: border-b border-[#E2E0D8] p-3 text-sm. Striped rows using bg-[#F9F8F6]/50 for alternate rows.

status_badges.tallied: bg-[#166534]/10 text-[#166534] border border-[#166534]/20 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest
status_badges.pending: bg-[#991B1B]/10 text-[#991B1B] border border-[#991B1B]/20 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest

page_composition.section_1_header: Dashboard title + Date + 'TALLIED' status badge aligned right.
page_composition.section_2_mtd_bar: Full width dark bar just below header with MTD Sales Volume (932 Goats), Gross (₹1.04 Cr), Days (7 Market Days), Net Commission (₹3.70L).
page_composition.section_3_metrics: 5-column grid for: Today's Goats (238), Today's Sales (₹26.71L), Net Commission (₹92,354 with 'Gross-Disc+RateDiff' subtext), Cash Total, Bank Total.
page_composition.section_4_ledgers: 3-column grid for detailed tables (col-span-1 each on lg displays). Col 1: Today's Transactions (Top 5). Col 2: Top Receivables (Patti). Col 3: Top Payables (Bepaari).

icons_and_assets.style: Stroke width 1.5. Colors: Use #C5A55A for decorative icons, #475569 for utility icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'IBM Plex Sans' in the project via next/font or standard HTML link tags.
Do NOT use Shadcn Card components if they force heavy rounded corners or shadows. Use raw HTML/Tailwind divs with sharp borders to emulate ledger pages.
Numbers MUST be formatted in the Indian Numbering System (e.g., ₹1,04,00,000 or ₹1.04 Cr).
Ensure all interactive and key data elements have 'data-testid' (e.g., data-testid='metric-today-sales').
Implement the layout precisely matching the Bahi Khata luxury theme: strict grids, sharp edges, dark sapphire anchors, gold accents.
Ensure hover states on table rows slightly darken the background (hover:bg-[#F9F8F6]).
Ensure all `.js` files are used for the React frontend, as requested by the user, avoiding `.tsx` unless explicitly configured for TypeScript.
